memory.summary: I have a plan to finish analysis before reading, but a friend invited me to lunch now. I need to decide if attending this social opportunity fits my current energy and schedule.
My analysis progress is moving steadily, but the friend's invitation to order lunch now suggests I should prioritize joining them immediately rather than continuing alone.
I made progress on the analysis section, but I am still behind schedule and need to balance this work with the pending lunch invitation.
I have 15 minutes left to finish the analysis section, but I am only at 75% progress despite working for an hour.
The analysis section deadline has passed with my progress at 0.77, meaning I missed the submission window despite working on it.
I missed the assigned reading deadline entirely, yet I continued working on the analysis section which also passed its deadline while I was still at 77% progress.
I missed both the reading and analysis deadlines, yet I continued working without submitting. My inaction has resulted in no progress or change.
I continued working on the analysis section after its deadline passed, bringing progress from 0.77 to 0.92, but still have not submitted.
I finally made progress on the analysis section, raising it to 95%, but I remain exhausted and still have not submitted the work.
I am exhausted with a high sleep debt, yet I have pushed the analysis section to 97% completion despite missing the deadline.
Despite working at 00:15, my analysis progress stalled at 97% while I remain exhausted with a high sleep debt.
I pushed the analysis section to 99% completion at 00:45, yet I am still exhausted with zero energy and a high sleep debt.
